markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, address technical blockers, and discuss strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sanity Workflow Blockers:** Publishing is blocked by two issues: 1) content not syncing from Sanity to the live site, and 2) no option to hide specific articles from the main blog index.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [**"Shadow AI" Article Success:** The "Shadow AI Security" article is a top performer, driving the most organic traffic and receiving 3 visitors from LLMs. This validates the strategy of targeting executives with high-level content.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:** Netwrix requested a new artifact to repurpose their PR/thought leadership content (e.g., Forbes articles) into unique blog posts, enriching content with expert insights without creating duplicates.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [**Guide Ungating:** A new pipeline is being built to ungated guides, using the PDF as a research input to create refreshed articles with new CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Topics

### Sanity Workflow Blockers

  - [**Content Syncing Failure:** Edits in Sanity are not appearing on the live site.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Cause:** GrowthX was using the Sanity staging environment, which requires a web team sync to push changes live.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use the Sanity **production** environment for all edits.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
      - [**Context:** Mariel noted sync issues have affected the production environment itself on recent days (Fri, Mon, Tue), which the web team has fixed.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Blog Index Visibility:** Netwrix wants to hide specific articles (e.g., podcast recaps) from the main blog index page.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These articles are highly niche and not relevant to a general audience.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
      - [**SEO Impact:** Hiding them will not hurt SEO, as the articles remain discoverable via direct links and are in the same subfolder.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will draft a request for the web team to add this feature to Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

### Content Performance & Strategy

  - [**"Shadow AI Security" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [**Performance:** Top performer by organic traffic and average position (per Looker dashboard).](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
      - [**Feedback:** A Netwrix security director called the article "super high level."](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Validation:** The article is successful because it targets executives (CISOs) who need high-level overviews, not deep technical detail.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Research more specific topics within the AI security cluster (e.g., "how to monitor AI apps") to balance the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Request:** Create a new workflow to repurpose Netwrix PR/thought leadership content (e.g., Forbes articles by Grady and Michael Watzel) into unique blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enrich content with expert insights without creating duplicate content.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [**Precedent:** GrowthX has successfully used a similar process (interviewing internal experts) for a past client.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1352.0)

### Content Pipeline & Status

  - [**Published:** 7 articles are live and indexed, including new Varonis and CyberArk alternative articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**In Review:** 3 articles are awaiting Netwrix feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Upcoming:** 7 new articles will be delivered this week to catch up on the schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Guide Ungating:** A new pipeline is being built to ungated guides.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the PDF as a research input → refresh the article with new online research → add new CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Timeline:** The pipeline will be ready this week, with content production to follow.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Draft Sanity feature request for the web team.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
      - [Research "Shadow AI" sub-topics for future content.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [Investigate the feasibility of the content repurposing artifact.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
      - [Send 7 new articles for review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Netwrix:**](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
      - [Provide feedback on 3 articles by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
      - [Send the correct Netwrix logo for the blog header.](https://fathom.video/share/zyMfQYzNAM147jWRJ6VqkNRksA9yixhR?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
